mapper.select: select id, user_id, setting_key, setting_value, created_at, updated_at from user_settings where user_id = #{userId} order by setting_key asc
mapper.insert: insert into user_settings(user_id, setting_key, setting_value) values(#{userId}, #{settingKey}, #{settingValue}) on duplicate key update setting_value = values(setting_value), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.delete: delete from user_settings where user_id = #{userId} and setting_key = #{settingKey}
